nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2028; const int b = 2079; const int c = 2130; const int d = 2180; const int e = 2231; const int f = 2282; const int g = 2332; const int h = 2383; const int i = 2434; const int j = 2484; const int k = 2535; const int l = 2586; const int m = 2636; const int n = 2687; const int o = 2738;
